mission: Create governed AI data packages that DreamCo can sell or license for model training, fine-tuning, retrieval, benchmarking, evaluation, and agent simulation.
positioning: DreamCo sells rights-cleared, quality-scored, metadata-rich AI data packages, not scraped private data or unverified content.

langchain.safety_note: LangChain tools and loaders must run with least privilege, source allowlists, and no secret-bearing paths.

allowed_sources: open-license data compatible with resale or commercial use
synthetic data derived from owned schemas
sandbox transcripts generated by DreamCo bots
blocked_sources: private customer data without explicit written approval
scraped platform data that violates terms
medical, legal, financial, or child data without specialist review
voice, face, likeness, or biometric data without consent proof

package_types.label: Instruction Tuning
package_types.buyer_use: Improve task following, customer support, and business workflow agents.

package_types.label: RAG Knowledge Base
package_types.buyer_use: Power retrieval systems with chunked, cited, metadata-rich documents.

package_types.label: Eval Benchmark
package_types.buyer_use: Test models, agents, tools, safety, and domain performance.

package_types.label: Agent Simulation
package_types.buyer_use: Train and test agents on multi-step business workflows.

package_types.label: Tool Calling
package_types.buyer_use: Train structured API, webhook, and workflow tool selection.

package_types.label: Domain Glossary
package_types.buyer_use: Teach models industry terminology, abbreviations, and structured definitions.

package_types.label: Conversation Safety
package_types.buyer_use: Evaluate refusals, approvals, escalation, and safe handoff behavior.

package_types.label: Synthetic Business Cases
package_types.buyer_use: Train models on sales, operations, finance, logistics, marketing, and startup scenarios.

package_types.label: Vision Labeling
package_types.buyer_use: Support image classification, OCR, layout, asset, and inspection datasets.

package_types.label: Audio and Voice Safe
package_types.buyer_use: Support consent-safe speech, pronunciation, narration, and transcription datasets.

package_types.label: Code Agent Tasks
package_types.buyer_use: Train and evaluate code agents on bugs, tests, refactors, and repo tasks.

package_types.label: Contract Opportunity Data
package_types.buyer_use: Train business agents to find, classify, and prepare opportunity packets.
